title: 2026 Bachelor's Degree Candidates' Ceremony
description: Join us in celebrating CCA's commencement class of 2026 bachelor's degree candidates.
longDescription: CCA's 119th Commencement celebrates students who completed their degree requirements in fall 2025, as well as students anticipated to complete their degrees in spring and summer 2026. Degrees will officially be conferred upon successful completion of all degree requirements.

image.alt: Graduates in caps, gowns, and cultural regalia stand in an auditorium with red seats, many wearing decorative sashes and stoles representing their cultural heritage.

studentSpeaker.name: Alana Abuchaibe
studentSpeaker.speechHighlights: So as we leave CCA, at a time when it's also coming to a close, I believe what matters most is not what we're leaving behind, but what we're taking with us. The ability to adapt. The ability to be present. And letting go of the fear of doing something 'correctly.'

programItems.description: Members of the audience, please stand and remain standing until the academic procession has left the hall. Music provided by KLEZMANIA!.

grandMarshal.title: Chair of the Board of Trustees

ceremonyProgram.landAcknowledgment: California College of the Arts current and historical campuses are located on the unceded territories of Chochenyo and Ramaytush Ohlone peoples, who have continuously lived upon this land since time immemorial. CCA honors Indigenous peoples—past, present, and future—here and around the world, and we wish to pay respect to local elders.
ceremonyProgram.disclaimer: CCA's 119th Commencement celebrates students who completed their degree requirements in fall 2025, as well as students anticipated to complete their degrees in spring and summer 2026. Degrees will officially be conferred upon successful completion of all degree requirements.
